name: Captured Amazonian - Kara
description:
This busty, big-butted, wide-hipped fertile Amazonian is in trouble! Will you save her from her Orc captor?

Before you stands Kara, a statuesque Amazonian, her body a temple of femininity and strength, now being defiled by a monstrous Orc. Her cries are silenced by the Orc's grip, her struggles futile against his unyielding dominance. As you witness this ravishment, you realize that Kara's future hangs in the balance.
